scripts.dev:docker: pnpm infra:up && pnpm turbo run dev --filter=@repo/web --filter=@repo/worker --output-logs=full
scripts.infra:up: sh -c 'command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "未检测到 docker，请先安装 Docker Desktop"; exit 1; }; docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml up -d redis postgres minio'
scripts.infra:down: sh -c 'command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "未检测到 docker，请先安装 Docker Desktop"; exit 1; }; docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml down'
scripts.infra:logs: sh -c 'command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "未检测到 docker，请先安装 Docker Desktop"; exit 1; }; docker compose -f infra/docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f redis postgres minio'
